ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol of the company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company's website */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the company's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_sector FOREIGN KEY ("sector") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_industry FOREIGN KEY ("industry") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the stock price belongs to */,
  "price" REAL /* Current stock price */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  "price_earnings" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio of the stock */,
  "earnings_share" REAL /* Earnings per share of the stock */,
  "book_value" REAL /* Book value of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Number of shares traded on the given date */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the stock price was recorded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the stock price record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the sector information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the industry belongs to */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the industry information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sec_filings" (
  "filing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SEC filing */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the SEC filing belongs to */,
  "filing_date" TEXT /* Date the SEC filing was made */,
  "filing_type" TEXT /* Type of SEC filing (e.g., 10-K, 10-Q) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the SEC filing document */,
  "filing_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the filing content */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the SEC filing record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sec_filings_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, investor) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
